The solid rubber outsole and stitch-down toe reinforcement also mean it has a high level of durability while the breathable athletic mesh means that your feet stay fresher for longer as you take on new challenges. Proudly sporting our classic logo on the side you can rest assured that the GEL-CONTEND 5 shoe will give you comfort and protection when you need it most. Weight: 10.25. Heel Height: 22mm. Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.

reviews.title: TREAT IT LIKE A SOCK
reviews.text:
PROS: Lightweight; very soft rubber soles (I would say strictly intended for inside use if you want them to last); and extremely comfortable.
CONS: Laces are too long (I replaced with "Lock Laces"); there's a learning curve to putting them on so as to avoid pulled muscles, damaged back, dislocated shoulder. Think about how you put on socks, then practice. These are not "shoes."

reviews.title: Very nice comfortable shoes
reviews.text: I like them very much, stylish, lots of compliments.  Color is perfect. (light Blue)

reviews.title: It's okay!
reviews.text:
These are based off the famous shoe from the other brand , it rhymes with Beezy450, which costs $100s of dollars! They are just a sock mesh put into a mold, where hot rubber is poured into the bottom which makes the sole. Put in a soft insole and boom, you got a foam runner shoe. Well these shoes are the same thing as the big brand, just without any logos.
The fit is not good for wide feet. They are only good for narrow and normal. If your feet is identical to the mold that they use for generic sizes, then it will fit you perfect and be very comfortable.
These are casual shoes and won't be great for dedicated sports like basketball or cross-country. 5-stars for being a great alternative to big name brands and for being very affordable. I can't think of anything bad to say about this shoe.

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: These shoes are lightweight, trendy & comfortable. Most shoes don't have all 3 for me. The price is great and are better than some of the tip brands out there. I definitely recommend these shoes. The quality is better than I expected.

reviews.title: Fit was expected
reviews.text: These are comparable to my name-brand sneakers. They fit well and are comfortable to wear, I'm very pleased with them and recommend them.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus 18 Running Shoe
description:
After 18 years of innovation, the Nimbus® series continues as one of the most recognized high performing footwear by ASICS. The new gel® placement offers modernized geometry of cushioning, designed to improve adaptability and mitigate brisk impacts. Improved guidance line® technology harmoniously syncs componentry to embrace the motions of the runner gait cycle.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: FluidRide: FluidRide  provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement on multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidFit:  ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 22 Running Shoes
description: The Gel-Cumulus 22 running shoe is the recommended choice for neutral runners who want a soft and flexible daily trainer with a great fit. This update features a one-piece superior mesh combined with a seamless 3D printing structure that balances support and comfort around the foot, giving you an excellent fit right away. Flytefoam midsole is softer than the previous version for comfortable riding. Under the heel where the foot hits for the first time the ground has been redesigned to better insulate the impact. This new heel design has deeper grooves on the forefoot and a softer midsole foam to give you a soft drive. A durable AHAR rubber sole has been placed in key contact areas to help the Gel-Cumulus 22 shoe withstand a ton of miles.

title: EZ-STIK 13.1 Half Marathon Decal Sticker 6" 5k 10k Running Shoes runnerA010
description: There is no background color. The surface that you apply the sticker to will become your background color. This will be a single color sticker. This is a DIE-CUT vinyl decal meaning that the background has been trimmed off. If there is a background color in the picture, it is used only as a representation. The background color will be the surface color you place the sticker on (or clear if you put it on a window). The decal will come with clear transfer tape, so you can easily apply it to anything you like (walls, windows, cars, mailbox, mirrors, laptops, etc etc etc). I use PREMIUM Oracal brand vinyl for all decals. Application is relatively easy. Your decal will come as THREE pieces - the backing paper, the sticker itself, and the clear transfer tape. Make sure you are applying to a CLEAN surface. You carefully pull the clear transfer tape up from the backing paper, making sure that it pulls the sticker up with it (if it does not, then firmly press down on it with a squee-gee or credit card or something similar until it sticks properly to the clear transfer tape). Then you apply the sticker and clear transfer tape to whatever surface you would like the decal on. You then use a squee-gee or credit card or something similar to firmly press down once again, making sure that the sticker STICKS, and then you carefully and slowly remove the clear transfer tape from the top, leaving behind only the sticker. I have found that on some surfaces (especially walls and wood surfaces), it helps to leave the clear transfer tape on for awhile to make sure everything is sticking well before removing it. I do not issue refunds or exchanges on vinyl decals. Please understand this before you bid. Some decals are more difficult to apply than others (especially the little ones!) - likewise, some surfaces are more difficult to apply decals to.

reviews.title: durable and comfortable
reviews.text: OK, so I was not expecting these to be comfortable for my 12.5hr shifts, nor was I expecting them to be durable. Surprise!! They are both. I am a nurse, enough said about comfort. I got poop on them, washed them in my washing machine, expecting to remove tattered and torn, I found them clean and INTACT!!!!! The color is just as bright as the day I  bought them. My coworkers are spending $150 or more on HOKA and I got these cheeeeap!! I love them!!!! Plus, when it rains they don't squeak????? I was so surprised, I don't know what to say about that. The heel is see thru and there isn't even any water inside after washing them. Sized very accurate, if anything they were 1/2 inch longer than expected. I wear a 7.5 in womens U.S. and these are not tight AT ALL, if I had gotten an 8, which I normally do when buying online and especially foreign, I would have been in trouble. Get them! I am getting another color as soon as I finish typing.

The energetic design of the GEL-Excite™ 3 features a Rearfoot GEL® Cushioning System and breathable mesh upper for everyday comfort. This exciting update is a great choice for low mileage runners seeking a great fit and cushioned ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. reviews.title: Hills are great, said no runner ever.
reviews.text: Will these bad boys cut time off my slowest mile? Probably not, but my feet will feel better in the process.

reviews.title: Started wearing Asics 40 years ago and loved the feel and sizing
reviews.text: gr8 price and feel. Started wearing Asics 40 years ago and loved the feel and sizing. Don't run much more but feel gr8 walking and hiking.

reviews.title: Three Stars
reviews.text: Good purchase

reviews.title: Great shoes
reviews.text: Fitment is a bit tight (my feet are wide) but no discomfort when wearing on the.wearhouse floor at work all day every day. Great arch and heel support, very light too compared to other shoes.

title: New Balance Women's W1260V5 Running Shoe
description: We stand for something bigger than sneakers. We champion those who are fearlessly driven by their passions. We elevate sport. We do right by people and the planet. Together, we drive meaningful change in communities around the world. We Got Now.
features: ABZORB heel crash pad absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance
Dual-density construction utilizes softer EVA on top for comfort and cushioning, with more dense EVA on bottom for support

reviews.title: Runs a tad large, order 1/2 size down.. still 5+ stars!!!!
reviews.text: I have bought New Balance 1260’s for years and I am always a size 10.  This shoe was too big as a 10 and I had to return for a 9.5.  That being said, I still give it 5 stars and would give more if I could!  These were by far the most comfortable, light weight, and best looking (better than the pic by far) New Balance I’ve ever owned. I ordered in another color the next day!  Love these shoes.

reviews.title: Great shoes though
reviews.text: Even though I ordered wide width they are a little more snug across the ball of my foot than my other new Balance shoes of the same size.  Great shoes though.  Very comfortable and lightweight.  Love the color too!

reviews.title: These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit
reviews.text: Wow! I have 2 pair of the 1260v4 that are my absolute favs.  These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit. I love the color and the attention to details.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoes!
reviews.text: I loved these shoes the first moment I put them on my feet.  They are so comfortable and provide so much support.  You really get your money's worth in these shoes.  They are like walking on clouds.  I walked in a 5K recently and they were amazing and my feet felt great afterwards. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Great style!
reviews.text: Great Shoe! I have received compliments on the style!

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: My new favorite running shoe.
reviews.text: Perfect fit right out of the box.  Wonderful cushioned run and very light weight.  Well made and no signs of wear even after several long runs.  Wide enough toe box to prevent any rubbing.  True to size.

reviews.title: BROOKS ARE The BEST SHOES HANDS DOWN
reviews.text: Nothing to dislike light durable great for weightlifting

reviews.title: Get what you pay for
reviews.text:
I sent these back after trying on. They look longer than they are when on your feet, I assume it’s due to the design. Didn’t have the best feel and overall a great name but bad shoe.
I’d go with a better brooks or On Clouds

reviews.title: Very light and comfortable
reviews.text: Nice and light and comfortable which was what I wanted. I love how well they fit. Good price, too, for the quality.

title: New Balance DRFT Running Shoe White
description: New Balance DRFT Women's Running Shoe Complete your next exercise wearing the New Balance DRFT Women's Running Shoe! This style has a breathable mesh upper with a cushioned with a supportive lace-up closure and padded collar. The cushioned insole adds padding and support on the go, while the rubber outsole is lightweight and flexible, perfect for every workout. Move smoothly and comfortably wearing the New Balance DRFT Women's Running Shoe! Lace-up closure Breathable mesh upper Cushioned insole Rubber outsole Padded collar White/Black/Purple Imported | New Balance DRFT Running Shoe White

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Very light and comfy.

reviews.title: very comfortable
reviews.text: I love New Balance tennis shoes.  They seem to fit my feet so well.  My last pair was well worn out, so I searched on Amazon to find a new pair.  I found these and the price was so good that I ordered them.  They fit perfectly and I love them.  So cozy to wear.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 4 Running Shoes
description:
The gt-2000 4 is the core runner’s bread and butter with its balance of cushioning and stability, outfitted by the comfortably supportive dynamic duomax and guidance trusstic system that also enhance gait efficiency. Our rear foot and forefoot gel cushioning systems are now even more adaptive, assisting mild to moderate over pronators alike with greater support, while the fluid ride midsole offers the ultimate ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: Impact Guidance System (I.G.S): ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic duomax Support System: This evolution of duomax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid ride: fluid ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Truss tic System: This Truss tic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Great shoe for an over-pronator like me
reviews.text: I've used the GT-2000 shoes over the last few years and have yet to have issue with them. I over-pronate pretty badly and this shoe offers great support for that issue; My knees thank me. I found the shoe to fit exactly true to size and for those reviews that say it's small, people tend to forget that your feet swell when you run, especially longer distances! My personal size foot is between a 6.5-7 and I typically wear a 7 shoe for running, dress, or sandals. I can't say I know the difference between the GT-2000 model numbers (1-5?) except for new-ness. I have no issue with wearing older models and like the cheaper prices. For reference, I run half marathons several times a year on city sidewalks, asphalt, dirt roads, and dirt trails.

reviews.title: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, ...
reviews.text: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, hearsay- I am not sure of the exact fit. They are exchanging for a bigger size though.

reviews.title: Great shoe but runs small
reviews.text: Great shoe, very supportive in the arch and heel. I love the bright colors of the Asics shoes. The only thing I would be leary of is the size of the shoe. It runs small. I wear an 8 and because of other reviews, bought a 8-1/2. They fit but are still a little snug. After wearing for a bit, they will loosen up enough to be great. If you have a wider foot, you may not like these particular shoes.

reviews.title: Color in photo is not quite accurate
reviews.text: Have always loved my Asics GT-2000.  32 marathons and our relationship continues!  My only comment about this particular color combo is the photo appears to be grey and more coral color.  When they arrived what looks like a coral color in the photo is closer to fluorescent orange!  They are a bit "loud".  If they had been full price I probably would not have chosen them because of this.  Too "loud" for my preferences.  However, given the clearance price I'll make do!  :)

reviews.title: ... been a fan of Asics and this did not disappoint!
reviews.text: I've always been a fan of Asics and this did not disappoint!
